# Copilot Instructions

This repo uses an AI-first SDLC. **The authoritative routing index is [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) at the repo root** — read it first.

Summary for Copilot Chat:
- Always start from [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md).
- Load context by silo, not all at once. See [.ai/context/silos/](../.ai/context/silos/).
- Log non-trivial decisions as ADRs in [.ai/decisions/](../.ai/decisions/).
- Append to [.ai/journal/](../.ai/journal/) at the end of a meaningful session.
- On task/feature completion, run `scripts/ai-commit.sh` per [.ai/workflows/commit-and-push.md](../.ai/workflows/commit-and-push.md).
- Follow the matching workflow in [.ai/workflows/](../.ai/workflows/) before doing the work.
